visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a female creator in a blue top facing the camera. A static image of a white wax apple tree is overlaid on the left. She holds a small piece of fruit near her face. The background is a brightly lit indoor living room with soft natural-looking lighting. (2) The creator holds a white ceramic plate containing five white wax apples. She picks one up, showing its pear-like shape and creamy white skin to the lens. She holds it with her right hand while looking directly at the camera with a curious expression. (3) The woman takes a large bite of the white wax apple. She shows the cross-section of the fruit, revealing a spongy, white internal texture. Her facial expressions are expressive as she chews and talks, looking at the fruit. (4) A transition occurs as she holds up a tiny, round green watermelon with dark stripes, roughly the size of a baseball. She rotates the fruit to show its uniform pattern. A blue and white patterned spoon is visible in the bowl below her hands. (5) She bites directly into the watermelon's skin. The red flesh is visible inside the bite mark as she pulls away. She chews vigorously, showing wide eyes and a smile to indicate surprise at the texture. (6) Using the blue spoon, she scoops out a piece of the red watermelon pulp. She continues to alternate between biting the fruit whole and using the spoon, maintaining high engagement with the camera until the end.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 來源TikTok Niaapriani926. [Variety]: 99%台灣人不知道的水果? [Slogan]: 白色蓮霧 & 棒球西瓜. [Subtitle]: 在海外已經很多人在吃的. (2) [Subtitle]: 白色蓮霧?. (3) [Slogan]: 實驗歐膩. [Logo]: @KoreanOnni. (4) [Variety]: 買好了. (5) [Subtitle]: 這個在一個很奇怪的地方買到. (不是大賣場或一般水果店). (6) [Subtitle]: 真的有白色的蓮霧. (7) [Subtitle]: 應該很少人吃過白色的吧... (8) [Subtitle]: 裡面長這樣!. (9) [Subtitle]: 長得像牙齒. (10) [Subtitle]: 用牙齒吃牙齒(?). (11) [Subtitle]: 好奇味道嗎?. (12) [Subtitle]: 白色的不是不好吃. 但是我覺得. (13) [Subtitle]: 紅色的更好吃, 清爽的感覺. (14) [Subtitle]: 雖然這個水分很多. (15) [Subtitle]: 但有莫名的草味. (16) [Subtitle]: 還有一個東西. (17) [Subtitle]: 這個是迷你西瓜. [Slogan]: 棒球西瓜. (18) [Subtitle]: 其實店家說可以直接咬一口. (19) [Subtitle]: 然後我剛剛拿出來的時候. (20) [Subtitle]: 不小心掉了. (21) [Subtitle]: 所以這裡已經變成這樣子. (22) [Subtitle]: (對不起西瓜). (23) [Variety]: 帥氣. (24) [Subtitle]: 我以為店家開玩笑... (25) [Subtitle]: 皮真的可以吃欸. (26) [Subtitle]: 而且西瓜的汁超豐富!. (27) [Variety]: 好甜喔!!!!!. (28) [Subtitle]: 西瓜皮很像小黃瓜皮那樣. (29) [Subtitle]: 不會硬, 真的可以直接吃. (30) [Subtitle]: 大家最想吃看看哪一個呢?.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue scoop-neck t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with a plain light-colored wall and some household furniture visible in the blur.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM with a strong, synthesized kick drum beat begins. A young female voice speaks in an energetic, high-arousal tone in Mandarin. The audio is crisp with prominent high frequencies. (2) The sound of a ceramic plate clinking is audible as the narrator adjusts her position. The BGM remains constant. Her vocal delivery is fast-paced with high pitch variability, creating an engaging atmosphere. (3) A sharp, resonant "crunch" sound occurs as the narrator bites into the fruit. This is immediately followed by rhythmic chewing sounds that exhibit a wet, percussive acoustic texture. (4) The narrator continues her speech, describing the flavor. Another distinct, high-bandwidth "crunch" bite sound is heard. The BGM maintains its steady, driving electronic pulse. (5) The speaker's voice drops slightly in pitch but remains animated as she compares flavors. There are minor incidental rustling sounds from her movements against her clothing. (6) A technical audio cut transitions to a new segment. The BGM continues seamlessly. The speaker's intonation rises as she introduces a new fruit, conveying curiosity. (7) A loud, heavy "crunch" sound marks the biting of the mini watermelon. The sound has more low-end resonance than the previous fruit. A vocal exclamation of joy follows. (8) Sound of a metal spoon clinking against ceramic is repeated several times. Continuous wet chewing and slurping sounds are heard until the end of the clip as the BGM fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a culinary showcase and review of rare fruits, specifically targeting a Taiwanese audience by introducing white wax apples and mini watermelons. It aims to entertain through sensory appeal (ASMR biting sounds) and informative first-person tasting experiences.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator mentions buying the items at a 'strange place' rather than a specific commercial outlet.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency text overlays and fast editing typical of short-form social media trends. The use of clear biting sounds suggests a deliberate ASMR appeal to enhance the food review experience.
